title: Production Evals For Agentic AI Systems - Nishant Gupta, Meta Superintelligence Labs
summary: The talk presents practical lessons on shifting from offline benchmarks to continuous evaluation pipelines for autonomous AI agents in production. It covers online vs offline eval architectures, human-in-the-loop systems, drift detection, and reliability metrics beyond model accuracy.
